achievements.description: Make a correct guess in the "Who Is the Man?" Game.

achievements.description: Defeat Emperor Doel without using Dragoon magic.

achievements.description: Befriend Meru.

achievements.description: In Fletz, survive against Lenus for ten turns in Dragoon form, and then defeat her.

achievements.description: With Haschel and Meru in your party, defeat the Ghost Commander by only using items.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.description: Reunite with the group after a plunge into the depths.

achievements.title: Muggles Do It Better
achievements.description: Defeat Lenus and Regole without using Dragoon transformations.

achievements.description: Acquire the Dragoon Spirit of the Blue Sea Dragon.

achievements.description: Finish off Chapter 2 with a romantic night under the stars.

achievements.description: Befriend Miranda.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.description: Open the sealed teleporter in Kadessa without getting caught by any of the Spinningheads.

achievements.title: The Final Countdown
achievements.description: Destroy the head of the Super Virage in Kadessa before its lives reach zero.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.description: With Albert and Miranda in your party, defeat the Grand Jewel while guarding no more than five times.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.description: With Rose and Haschel in your party, defeat the Divine Dragon without destroying any of its appendages.

achievements.description: Witness the birth of a new Dragoon Spirit.

achievements.description: Spare the life of the one who's caused your company much suffering.

achievements.title: The Will of the Fallen
achievements.description: Defeat the Polter Armor.

achievements.description: Learn the awful truth about your journey and finish Chapter 3.

achievements.description: Carry on in lieu of the one who wished to protect the world.

achievements.description: With Meru and Miranda in your party, defeat Kubila, Selebus, and Vector simultaneously.

achievements.description: Complete Chapter 4 and forever alter the course of the world.
